***ANNOUNCEMENT***

Coming on June 30th on standard edition #4K in the US from #ParamountPictures: #KingKong (1976)! 

Legendary producer Dino De Laurentiis teamed up with director John Guillermin (THE TOWERING INFERNO) for this epic, ambitious retelling of the classic adventure,
data.author: did:plc:wjldefaxmyo5ext6my6qjesk

data.body:
available for a limited time on 4K Blu-ray.

An oil company's greed leads a crew to explore a strange island, only to unleash a beast known as "Kong." Jeff Bridges, Charles Grodin, and Jessica Lange (in her feature-film debut) star in this action-packed production,
data.author: did:plc:wjldefaxmyo5ext6my6qjesk

from the remote Indian Ocean to the busy streets of New York City—trembling with each echoing footstep of the towering ape set loose.
